A : Type u_1
inst✝⁸ : CommRing A
inst✝⁷ : IsNoetherianRing A
inst✝⁶ : @HeightOneLocalizationIsPID A inst✝⁸
M : Type u_2
inst✝⁵ : AddCommGroup M
inst✝⁴ : Module A M
inst✝³ : Module.Finite A M
hMT : IsTorsion A M
N : Type u_3
inst✝² : AddCommGroup N
inst✝¹ : Module A N
inst✝ : Module.Finite A N
hNT : IsTorsion A N
⊢ M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] N ↔
    ∀ (p : PrimeSpectrum A),
      p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1 →
        Nonempty
          (LocalizedModule p.asIdeal.primeCompl M ≃ₗ[Localization p.asIdeal.primeCompl]
            LocalizedModule p.asIdeal.primeCompl N)

constructor
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    have hker := hf.1
    have hcoker := hf.2
    rw [Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton] at hker hcoker
    have hker' := hker p (by simp [hp])

    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff] at hker' hcoker'
    have hinj : Function.Injective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f) := by
      rw [← LinearMap.ker_eq_bot, Submodule.eq_bot_iff]
      intro x hx
      rw [LinearMap.mem_ker] at hx
      induction x using LocalizedModule.induction_on with
      | h m s =>
        simp only [LocalizedModule.map_mk] at hx
        obtain ⟨t, ht, htf⟩ := (LocalizedModule.mk_eq_zero _).mp hx
        obtain ⟨r, hr, hrm⟩ := hker' ⟨t • f m, by simp [LinearMap.map_smul, htf]⟩
        have : r * t • m ∈ LinearMap.ker f := by
          rw [LinearMap.mem_ker, LinearMap.map_smul, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm, mul_smul]
          simpa using hrm
        obtain ⟨u, hu, hum⟩ := hker' ⟨_, this⟩
        simp only [SetLike.mk_smul_mk, Submodule.mk_eq_zero] at hum
        rw [LocalizedModule.mk_eq_zero]
        exact ⟨u * r * t, Submonoid.mul_mem _ (Submonoid.mul_mem _ hu hr) ht, by ring_nf; exact hum⟩
    have hsurj : Function.Surjective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f) := by
      intro y
      induction y using LocalizedModule.induction_on with
      | h n s =>
        obtain ⟨t, ht, htn⟩ := hcoker' (Submodule.Quotient.mk n)
        simp only [SetLike.mk_smul_mk, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at htn
        obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := htn
        use LocalizedModule.mk m (t * s)
        simp [LocalizedModule.map_mk, LocalizedModule.mk_eq, hm]
        use 1, Submonoid.one_mem _
        ring
    exact ⟨LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ ⟨hinj, hsurj⟩⟩
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨ι, hι, p, hp, e, he, ⟨fM, hfM⟩⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨ι', hι', p', hp', e', he', ⟨fN, hfN⟩⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    sorry
sorry
sorry

  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    have hM' : Module.IsTorsion A M := hMT
    have hN' : Module.IsTorsion A N := hNT
    rw [isPseudoIsomorphism_iff] at hf
    have hker := hf.1.primeHeight_one_imp_subsingleton p hp
    have hcoker := hf.2.primeHeight_one_imp_subsingleton p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff] at hker hcoker
    have hinj : Function.Injective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f) := by
      rw [← LinearMap.ker_eq_bot, Submodule.eq_bot_iff]
      intro x hx
      rw [LinearMap.mem_ker] at hx
      obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := LocalizedModule.mk_surjective p.1.primeCompl x
      rw [← hm] at hx
      simp only [LocalizedModule.map_mk] at hx
      rw [LocalizedModule.mk_eq_zero] at hx
      obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := hx
      have : s • m ∈ LinearMap.ker f := by simp [LinearMap.mem_ker, hs]
      obtain ⟨t, ht, ht'⟩ := hker ⟨s • m, this⟩
      rw [← hm, LocalizedModule.mk_eq_zero]
      use ⟨t, ht⟩
      simp only [SetLike.mk_smul_mk, Submodule.mk_eq_zero] at ht'
      exact ht'
    have hsurj : Function.Surjective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f) := by
      intro y
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := LocalizedModule.mk_surjective p.1.primeCompl y
      obtain ⟨s, hs, hs'⟩ := hcoker (Submodule.Quotient.mk n)
      rw [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at hs'
      obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := hs'
      use LocalizedModule.mk m ⟨s, hs⟩
      rw [LocalizedModule.map_mk, ← hn, ← hm]
      simp [LocalizedModule.smul'_mk]
    exact ⟨LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ ⟨hinj, hsurj⟩⟩
  · intro h
    rw [isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_characteristicIdeal hMT hNT]
    ext p
    by_cases hp : p.1.primeHeight = 1
    · specialize h p hp
      obtain ⟨e⟩ := h
      simp only [characteristicIdeal, Multiset.count_filter]
      congr 1
      rw [Module.ordPrimePower_eq_ordPrimePower_of_linearEquiv e]
    · simp only [characteristicIdeal, Multiset.count_filter, hp, ↓reduceIte]
sorry

constructor
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    have hf' := hf
    rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff] at hf'
    have hker := hf'.1.primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton p hp
    have hcoker := hf'.2.primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff] at hker hcoker
    refine ⟨LinearEquiv.ofBijective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f) ⟨?_, ?_⟩⟩
    · rw [← LinearMap.ker_eq_bot]
      ext x
      simp only [LinearMap.mem_ker, Submodule.mem_bot]
      constructor
      · intro hx
        obtain ⟨s, hs, eq⟩ := hker ⟨x, hx⟩
        simpa using eq
      · intro hx
        simp [hx]
    · rw [← LinearMap.range_eq_top]
      ext y
      simp only [LinearMap.mem_range, Submodule.mem_top, iff_true]
      obtain ⟨s, hs, eq⟩ := hcoker (Submodule.Quotient.mk y)
      rw [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at eq
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := eq
      use LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap p.1.primeCompl M x
      rw [LocalizedModule.map_mkLinearMap, ← hx]
      conv_rhs => rw [← one_smul (Localization p.1.primeCompl) y]
      rw [← IsLocalization.mk'_one (M := p.1.primeCompl) (S := Localization p.1.primeCompl) s,
          LocalizedModule.smul'_mk, one_smul, LocalizedModule.mk_cancel]
  · intro h
    sorry

constructor
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    have hf' := (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).mp hf
    set sigma := (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A N) ∩ {q : PrimeSpectrum A | q.1.primeHeight = 1}
    set S := ⨅ q ∈ sigma, q.1.primeCompl
    by_cases hmem : p ∈ sigma
    · have : p.1.primeCompl ≤ S := by
        simp only [S, Submonoid.iInf_le_of_mem hmem]
      exact ⟨(LocalizedModule.map_linearEquiv_of_bijective S f hf').localize this⟩
    · simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_and, not_or] at hmem
      specialize hmem hp
      rw [Module.notMem_support_iff] at hmem
      have hM := hmem.1
      have hN := hmem.2
      rw [Module.notMem_support_iff] at hN
      exact ⟨{ toFun := fun _ => 0, map_add' := by simp, map_smul' := by simp,
               invFun := fun _ => 0, left_inv := fun x => hM.elim x, right_inv := fun x => hN.elim x }⟩
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨ιM, finM, pM, hpM, eM, heM, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨ιN, finN, pN, hpN, eN, heN, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    sorry

constructor
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff] at hf
    have hker := hf.1
    have hcoker := hf.2
    rw [Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton] at hker hcoker
    have hker' := hker p (le_of_eq hp)
    have hcoker' := hcoker p (le_of_eq hp)
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff] at hker' hcoker'
    refine ⟨?_⟩
    refine LinearEquiv.ofBijective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f) ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [← LinearMap.ker_eq_bot, Submodule.eq_bot_iff]
      intro x hx
      rw [LinearMap.mem_ker] at hx
      induction x using LocalizedModule.induction_on with
      | h m s =>
        obtain ⟨t, ht, heq⟩ := hker' ⟨m, by simp [LocalizedModule.map_mk] at hx; exact hx⟩
        simp only [SetLike.mk_smul_mk, Submodule.mk_eq_zero] at heq
        simp [LocalizedModule.smul_def, LocalizedModule.mk_eq_zero, heq]
    · rw [← LinearMap.range_eq_top, Submodule.eq_top_iff']
      intro x
      induction x using LocalizedModule.induction_on with
      | h n s =>
        obtain ⟨t, ht, heq⟩ := hcoker' (Submodule.Quotient.mk n)
        simp only [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at heq
        obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := heq
        rw [LinearMap.mem_range]
        use LocalizedModule.mk m (s * t)
        simp [LocalizedModule.map_mk, hm, LocalizedModule.mk_smul_mk, mul_comm]
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨ι, _, p, hp, e, he, ⟨fM, hfM⟩⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨ι', _, p', hp', e', he', ⟨fN, hfN⟩⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    sorry

rw [isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_characteristicIdeal_eq hMT hNT]
  simp_rw [Ideal.ext_iff, Ideal.characteristicIdeal_mem_iff, ← Submodule.finrank_localizedModule_eq_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h p hp
    exact ⟨LinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq _ _ (h p hp)⟩
  · intro h p hp
    exact (h p hp).some.finrank_eq
sorry
